description: This is a more or less basic yose problem, theme is to evaluate how much S18 is worth and playing it at the right time. Except the S18 question there is no trick, other yose moves are just ordered gote/gote moves.

(;B[rc]C[I do not include the continuation after this move. Locally this is a very bad yose move except in very special case where by example it is the last move of the game. If you want to play in this area the usual move is S18, it is better because if white answers you accomplish something in sente, if white doesn't you'll have a huge continuation (monky jump)])
(;B[ob]C[No need to add a move here, white was already dead.]))
